title: Integrated Employment Services
text:
Integrated Employment Services - SupportGoWhere
Integrated Employment Services
Share link
Provides vocational training, job placement and job support for persons with mental health conditions.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Centre-based, Online
Free
Referral required
SERVICE PROVIDERS
Find service providers near you
Collapse all sections
About this support

The programme provides the following services:

Vocational assessment and training (classroom based and on-the-job training)

Job placement and support

Employees Assistance Programme for employees who need workplace counselling

Peer support network

Mental Health and Wellness Education Programme, and consultations for employers

Who is this for?

Individuals recovering from mental health conditions who are interested, must be an active participant in identifying and prioritising employment planning as their primary goal.

What to expect?

First contact will be made within 3 working days from the time of receiving the referrals.

Intake assessment will be conducted within 7 working days from the time of first contact.

Referral outcome will be decided within 3 working days from the time of intake assessment.

The referring source will be informed of the referral outcome within 3 working days after recommendation is made.

How to apply?

Individuals can call the agency to make an appointment for the intake assessment, or ask the referring source (e.g. hospital) to make a referral to SACS.

Information last updated on 26 Sep 2025
